changes: Wind Tackle: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 20 seconds.
Energy Drain: Potency has been increased from 750 to 1,000.
Vercure: Cast time has been reduced from 1.8 to 1.3 seconds.
Enchanted Riposte: Potency has been increased from 1,500 to 1,750.
Enchanted Zwerchhau: Potency has been increased from 1,750 to 2,000.
Enchanted Redoublement: Potency has been increased from 2,000 to 2,250.

new_content.name: Eureka Pyros
new_content.description: An instanced area of fire and ice where players explore, fight monsters, and utilize exclusive logos actions.

new_content.name: And We Shall Call It Pyros
new_content.description: Quest to unlock the Eureka Pyros content.

new_content.name: The Black Heart Beneath
new_content.description: A new side story quest in the Even Further Hildibrand Adventures line.

new_content.name: Good Swords, Good Dogs
new_content.description: A new side story quest in the Even Further Hildibrand Adventures line.

new_content.name: Logos Actions
new_content.description: A new type of duty action available in Eureka Pyros produced by combining logograms.

new_content.name: Server Backup
new_content.description: A beta feature allowing players to save backups of character settings and client settings to the FFXIV server.

new_content.name: Eureka Weapons
new_content.description: Augmentation of Eureka weapons continues in Pyros, requiring the research and registration of logos actions.

new_content.name: Triple Triad Additions
new_content.description: New cards, new NPC opponents, and new prizes available for MGP.

housing.name: Adventuring Pack
housing.description: An adventurer never leaves home without his compass! And his waterskin. And his lantern. And his potions. And his telescope. And his books. Really, an adventurer needs to learn to pack a bit lighter.

housing.name: Spice Rack
housing.description: This storage unit is packed with enough spices, herbs, oils, and other ingredients to satisfy even the most dedicated culinarian.

housing.name: Glass Jars
housing.description: Opaque vessels of assorted size, perhaps containing flour and sugar. Or cookies. Or bugs.

housing.name: Wooden Plates
housing.description: Dishes for those with simple tastes and many friends.

housing.name: Wooden Cups
housing.description: A half-dozen goblets for fancy parties. Cupbearer not included.
